name: Awin Affiliate Network API
what_it_does: Awin affiliate network REST API for advertisers and publishers to manage affiliate partnerships, track conversions, access commission reporting, and automate publisher relationship management across Awin's global network of 25,000+ advertisers and 1M+ publishers including Etsy, HP, and AO.com. Enables AI agents to manage advertiser program configuration for affiliate network automation, handle publisher recruitment and approval for partner program automation, access transaction and conversion reporting for affiliate attribution automation, retrieve commission calculation and payment for publisher compensation automation, manage deep link generation for affiliate tracking automation, handle publisher performance analytics for optimization automation, access creative and promotional material management for affiliate content automation, retrieve real-time conversion feed for affiliate intelligence automation, manage coupon and voucher code tracking for affiliate incentive automation, and integrate Awin with ShareASale (Awin company), Shopify, WooCommerce, and e-commerce platforms for end-to-end global affiliate network automation.
use_cases: Managing affiliate publisher recruitment from advertiser program automation agents
Tracking affiliate conversions from performance marketing attribution agents
Distributing affiliate commissions from publisher payment automation agents
Analyzing publisher performance from affiliate optimization agents
not_for: SaaS referral programs (use Rewardful or FirstPromoter for SaaS referral)
Influencer marketing (Awin is publisher affiliate, not influencer-first)
B2B partner programs (use PartnerStack for B2B software partner programs)
best_when: An e-commerce advertiser or publisher wanting AI agents to automate affiliate program management, conversion tracking, publisher relationship management, and commission reporting across Awin's global affiliate network.
avoid_when: AFFILIATE TRACKING REQUIRES PIXEL OR SERVER-SIDE: Awin conversion tracking uses JavaScript pixel or server-side API; automated conversion tracking must implement correct tracking method; automated missing conversion tracking pixel creates unattributed sales and unpaid commissions. PUBLISHER APPROVAL IS MANUAL PROCESS: Awin publisher approval for advertiser programs often requires manual review; automated publisher recruitment has approval delay; automated immediate publisher activation after application creates incorrect assumption of instant access. DATA FEED UPDATES HAVE LATENCY: Awin transaction and conversion data feeds update with delay (up to 24 hours); automated real-time reporting from Awin feed creates stale performance data; automated decisions on Awin data should note data freshness. VOUCHER CODE EXCLUSIVITY: Awin voucher codes must be configured as publisher-exclusive or public; automated coupon distribution must set exclusivity correctly; automated public voucher code for publisher-exclusive promotion creates voucher code shared beyond intended publisher.

auth.notes: Awin uses OAuth 2.0 token for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Berlin, Germany HQ. Founded 2000 (as Zanox, rebranded 2017). Axel Springer subsidiary. Acquired ShareASale (2017). 25,000+ advertisers, 1M+ publishers. Products: Affiliate tracking, publisher directory, commission management, creative management, voucher codes. GDPR. ISO 27001. Serves global e-commerce advertisers. Competes with CJ Affiliate and Rakuten for global affiliate.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — advertiser program requires setup fee and deposit
pricing.paid_tiers: Advertiser: £500 setup fee + 3% override on commissions; Publisher: free to join; deposit required
pricing.notes: Berlin DE. Axel Springer subsidiary. Commission override model. £500 setup fee for advertisers. GDPR compliant.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; reporting and transaction APIs throttled per hour; no webhooks — pull-based

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING REQUIRED: Awin does not use webhooks; automated conversion monitoring requires polling Awin transaction API on schedule; automated real-time conversion alert via webhook creates no notification delivery

ADVERTISER ID REQUIRED FOR ALL REQUESTS: Awin API requires advertiser ID in most endpoints; automated multi-advertiser integration must include correct advertiser ID per request; automated missing advertiser ID creates unauthorized or empty response

TRANSACTION DATA HAS 24-48 HOUR LATENCY: Awin transaction data may not appear immediately in API; automated reconciliation must account for reporting latency; automated same-day reconciliation creates incomplete transaction records

VOUCHER CODE TRACKING REQUIRES SEPARATE CONFIGURATION: Awin voucher code tracking is separate from click tracking; automated coupon-based affiliate tracking must configure voucher code tracking; automated click-only tracking misses conversions from coupon-first users who bypass affiliate links

PUBLISHER COMMISSION RATES ARE PROGRAM-LEVEL: Awin commission rates are configured at program level with publisher-specific overrides; automated commission management must understand rate hierarchy; automated flat-rate assumption for all publishers creates incorrect commission calculation for publishers with negotiated rates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Affiliate network. GDPR, ISO 27001. OAuth2. EU. Publisher and conversion data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global affiliate. GDPR. OAuth2. EU. Affiliate conversion and publisher data.
